name: Bulbasaur
desc: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokémon.

name: Ivysaur
desc: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

name: Venusaur
desc: The plant blooms when it absorbs solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

name: Charmander
desc: Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: Charmeleon
desc: When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to a unbearably high level.

name: Charizard
desc: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.

name: Squirtle
desc: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.

name: Wartortle
desc: Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance.

name: Blastoise
desc: A brutal Pokémon with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.

name: Caterpie
desc: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

name: Metapod
desc: This Pokémon is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.

name: Butterfree
desc: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.

name: Weedle
desc: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp, venomous stinger on its head.

name: Kakuna
desc: Almost incapable of moving, this Pokémon can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.

name: Beedrill
desc: Flies at high speed and attacks using its three venomous stingers on its forelegs and abdomen.

name: Pidgey
desc: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

name: Pidgeotto
desc: Very protective of its sprawling territory, this Pokémon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

name: Pidgeot
desc: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unsuspecting prey such as Magikarp.

name: Rattata
desc: Bites on anything to test it. Will make its nest anywhere and is capable of living in any environment.

name: Raticate
desc: Its hind feet are webbed. They act as flippers, so it can swim in rivers and hunt for food.

name: Spearow
desc: Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its busy wings at high speed to stay airborne.

name: Fearow
desc: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for a rest.

name: Ekans
desc: Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as Pidgey and Spearow, whole.

name: Arbok
desc: It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area.

name: Pikachu
desc: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can build and cause lightning storms.

name: Raichu
desc: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.

name: Sandshrew
desc: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.

name: Sandslash
desc: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll along the ground to attack or escape.

name: Nidoran♀
desc: Although small, its venomous barbs make this Pokémon highly dangerous. The female has smaller horns.

name: Nidorina
desc: The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting.

name: Nidoqueen
desc: Its hard scales provide robust protection. It uses its heavy bulk to execute powerful moves.

name: Nidoran♂
desc: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horn, the more potent its secreted venom.

name: Nidorino
desc: An aggressive Pokémon that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes powerful venom.

name: Nidoking
desc: It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then crush the bones of its prey.

name: Clefairy
desc: Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is highly rare and found only in select areas.

name: Clefable
desc: A timid fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Vulpix
desc: At the time of its birth, it has only one white tail. The tail splits into six if it receives love.

name: Ninetales
desc: Very smart and highly vindictive. Grabbing one of its many golden tails could result in a 1000-year curse.

name: Jigglypuff
desc: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: Wigglytuff
desc: Its body is exceptionally full of elasticity. By inhaling deeply, it can inflate itself infinitely.

name: Zubat
desc: Emits ultrasonic cries from its mouth to check for obstacles and navigate dark caves safely.

name: Golbat
desc: Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it becomes too heavy to fly.

name: Oddish
desc: During the day, it keeps its face buried underground. It walks around planting seeds at night.

name: Gloom
desc: The fluid that drips from its mouth is not drool. It is a sweet nectar used to lure prey.

name: Vileplume
desc: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its head is heavy and hard to hold up.

name: Paras
desc: Burrows to suck tree roots. The tochukaso mushrooms on its back grow by drawing nutrients from the host.

name: Parasect
desc: A host-parasite pair in which the parasite mushroom has completely overtaken the bug host.

name: Venonat
desc: Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats bugs. It is attracted by light at night.

name: Venomoth
desc: The dustlike scales covering its wings are color-coded to indicate the type of poison they secrete.

name: Diglett
desc: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.

name: Dugtrio
desc: A team of Diglett triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing deep into the bedrock.

name: Meowth
desc: Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

name: Persian
desc: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle nature.

name: Psyduck
desc: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily Pokémon uses telekinetic powers.

name: Golduck
desc: Often seen swimming elegantly along lake shores. It is easily mistaken for the Japanese mythical Kappa.

name: Mankey
desc: Extremely quick to anger. It could be quiet one moment, then thrashing around wildly the next.

name: Primeape
desc: Always furious and tenacious. It will chase any opponent until the target is completely beaten.

name: Growlithe
desc: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to drive away intruders from its home.

name: Arcanine
desc: An ancient legendary Pokémon in China. Many people are charmed by its grace and beauty while running.

name: Poliwag
desc: Its newly grown legs are shaky, so it prefers to swim. The spiral on its belly is its internal organs.

name: Poliwhirl
desc: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it constantly sweats to keep its skin slimy.

name: Poliwrath
desc: An excellent swimmer. Its strong muscles make it highly adept at both martial arts and swimming.

name: Abra
desc: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and teleport to safety.

name: Kadabra
desc: It emits special alpha waves that cause headaches and computer glitches to those nearby.

name: Alakazam
desc: Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its IQ is rumored to be approximately 5,000.

name: Machop
desc: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become stronger.

name: Machoke
desc: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to keep its actions regulated.

name: Machamp
desc: Using its four powerful arms, it can execute a flurry of 1,000 punches in just two seconds.

name: Bellsprout
desc: A carnivorous Pokémon that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to absorb moisture.

name: Weepinbell
desc: It spits out poisonpowder to immobilize the enemy, and then finishes it with a spray of acid.

name: Victreebel
desc: Lures prey with its honey-like aroma. Anything that enters its mouth is melted by acids.

name: Tentacool
desc: Drifts in shallow water. Anglers who hook them by accident are frequently stung.

name: Tentacruel
desc: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and constrict prey.

name: Geodude
desc: Found in fields and mountains. Often mistaken for an ordinary rock, people trip over them.

name: Graveler
desc: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing down or changing direction.

name: Golem
desc: Its boulder-hard shell is capable of withstanding attacks from even the heaviest explosives.

name: Ponyta
desc: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamond. It can easily trample anything in its path.

name: Rapidash
desc: Very competitive, it will chase anything that moves fast in hopes of racing it.

name: Slowpoke
desc: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes five seconds for it to feel pain when its tail is bitten.

name: Slowbro
desc: An attached Shellder on its tail has caused this Pokémon to lose all sensation of pain.

name: Magnemite
desc: Uses electromagnetic gravity to float in the air. It discharges waves from its side magnets.

name: Magneton
desc: A cluster of three Magnemite. It causes high frequency radio waves and severe power grid static.

name: Farfetch'd
desc: Always carries a delicious green onion stalk. It will defend its stalk with its very life.

name: Doduo
desc: A two-headed bird. Even while sleeping, one head remains alert and scans for danger.

name: Dodrio
desc: Uses its three brains to execute complex strategies. While two sleep, one always stays awake.

name: Seel
desc: The light blue fur covering its skin protects it from the freezing cold of glacial oceans.

name: Dewgong
desc: Its entire body is snowy white. It can swim at high speed through freezing glacial waters.

name: Grimer
desc: Appears in filthy areas. It feeds on toxic sludge from factories and polluted rivers.

name: Muk
desc: Thickly covered in toxic sludge. Its footprints are toxic and will instantly kill plant life.

name: Shellder
desc: Its hard shell repels any attack. It exposes its soft body only when it attacks.

name: Cloyster
desc: When attacked, it launches its spikes in rapid succession. Its inner core is still unknown.

name: Gastly
desc: Almost invisible, this gaseous Pokémon cloaks its target and lulls it to sleep.

name: Haunter
desc: Because of its ability to slip through solid walls, it is rumored to be from another dimension.

name: Gengar
desc: Under a full moon, this Pokémon mimics the shadows of people and laughs at their fright.

name: Onix
desc: As it tunnels underground, it absorbs solid material to make its rock body harder.

name: Drowzee
desc: Puts enemies to sleep then eats their dreams. It has a high preference for delicious fun dreams.

name: Hypno
desc: Carries a pendulum-like device. It is rumored that a child was once hypnotized and taken by one.

name: Krabby
desc: Its pincers are superb weapons. They sometimes break off during battle, but grow back quickly.

name: Kingler
desc: Its oversized left claw is incredibly strong, but is also very heavy and hard to aim.

name: Voltorb
desc: Usually found in power plants. Often mistaken for a Poké Ball, it is highly explosive.

name: Electrode
desc: It stores high pressure electric energy inside. It explodes at the slightest provocation.

name: Exeggcute
desc: Often mistaken for ordinary eggs. When cracks appear, it is a sign that it is close to evolution.

name: Exeggutor
desc: Legend has it that if one of its heads grows too large, it falls off and becomes an Exeggcute.

name: Cubone
desc: Wears the skull of its deceased mother. Its cries echo inside the skull as a sad melody.

name: Marowak
desc: Small and weak at first, it became hardy and aggressive by brandishing bones as weapons.

name: Hitmonlee
desc: Its legs can freely stretch to twice their length. Extremely agile and skilled at kicking.

name: Hitmonchan
desc: Its punches are faster than a bullet train. It executes all punches with incredible speed.

name: Lickitung
desc: Its tongue is twice its height. It is used like an arm to grab food and lick opponents.

name: Koffing
desc: Because it stores toxic gases inside, it is prone to exploding without any warning.

name: Weezing
desc: It grows by feeding on toxic dust and industrial waste. The smell is incredibly foul.

name: Rhyhorn
desc: Its massive bones are 1,000 times harder than human bones. It can easily knock over trailers.

name: Rhydon
desc: Protected by an armor-like hide. It can survive in molten lava of over 3,600 degrees.

name: Chansey
desc: A gentle and kind Pokémon that shares its highly nutritious eggs with injured people.

name: Tangela
desc: Its entire body is swathed in blue vines. They tickle and bind anything that gets close.

name: Kangaskhan
desc: The female raises its offspring inside its belly pouch. It will protect its baby at all costs.

name: Horsea
desc: Known to shoot ink at flying bugs from the surface of lakes and quiet oceanic inlets.

name: Seadra
desc: Its sharp scales can secrete poison. Its tail remains coiled to maintain balance while swimming.

name: Goldeen
desc: Its tail fin billows like an elegant gown. Known as the Water Queen among trainers.

name: Seaking
desc: In autumn, it can be seen boring holes into riverbed rocks to build nests for its eggs.

name: Staryu
desc: An enigmatic star-like shape. Its red central core glows brilliantly at night.

name: Starmie
desc: Its central core glows in seven colors. Many think it is sending signals into space.

name: Mr. Mime
desc: A master of pantomime. It generates invisible but solid walls by vibrating its fingertips.

name: Scyther
desc: With ninja-like speed and agility, it can slice through thick logs with a single swipe.

name: Jynx
desc: It seductively wiggles its hips while walking. Its rhythmic dance steps are infectious.

name: Electabuzz
desc: Usually found near power plants. It loves to eat electricity and can cause major blackouts.

name: Magmar
desc: Born in active volcanoes. Its body heat is so intense that its surface glows yellow.

name: Pinsir
desc: Grips prey with its powerful horns. Once clamped, it will not let go until the prey is torn.

name: Tauros
desc: A rowdy and violent bull. It whips itself with its three tails to build up momentum.

name: Magikarp
desc: Famous for being extremely weak and unreliable. It can only splash around uselessly.

name: Gyarados
desc: Extremely vicious and destructive. Known to appear during wars and leave cities in ruins.

name: Lapras
desc: A gentle soul that can read minds. It enjoys carrying people across oceans on its back.

name: Ditto
desc: It can reconstruct its entire cellular structure to transform into anything it sees.

name: Eevee
desc: Its genetically unstable DNA allows it to evolve into various unique elemental forms.

name: Vaporeon
desc: Its cell structure is similar to water molecules. It can melt and become completely invisible.

name: Jolteon
desc: Every hair on its body can stand up like sharp needles to discharge high voltage power.

name: Flareon
desc: Inhales air and heats it up to 3,000 degrees in its flame bag before spitting fire.

name: Porygon
desc: An artificial Pokémon created completely through code. It can freely enter cyberspace.

name: Omanyte
desc: An ancient Pokémon resurrected from a fossil. It uses its tentacles to drift in oceans.

name: Omastar
desc: Its heavy shell made it slow and clumsy, which is rumored to have led to its extinction.

name: Kabuto
desc: Resurrected from a fossil. It protects its soft inner body with a robust hard shell.

name: Kabutops
desc: Its razor-sharp scythes are excellent weapons. It is a highly efficient underwater predator.

name: Aerodactyl
desc: A vicious prehistoric Pokémon that attacks the throat of its prey with sharp fangs.

name: Snorlax
desc: Its stomach can digest any moldy or toxic food. It is happy only when eating and sleeping.

name: Articuno
desc: A legendary bird Pokémon that can freeze moisture in the air to cause heavy snowfalls.

name: Zapdos
desc: A legendary bird said to appear from thick thunderclouds while dropping lightning bolts.

name: Moltres
desc: Its beautiful wings glow with intense flames. It is said to bring early spring to areas it visits.

name: Dratini
desc: Long called a mythical Pokémon until a small colony was discovered underwater.

name: Dragonair
desc: It is said to hold a mystical power that can instantly control weather and climate.

name: Dragonite
desc: Despite its bulk, it can fly incredibly fast. It is highly intelligent and kind-hearted.

name: Mewtwo
desc: A Pokémon created by genetic engineering. It is notorious for its incredible psychic powers.

name: Mew
desc: Because it can learn any move, many scientists believe it is the ancestor of all Pokémon.
